# Orange Labz

Orange Labz is an AI implementation firm based in Bengaluru, India. We build and deploy inbound-first AI agents (voice, WhatsApp, SMS, email) on client-owned, single-tenant AWS infrastructure.

## Core Services
- **AI Agents**: Voice, WhatsApp, SMS, and email qualification and booking agents.
- **AI Implementation**: Hand-crafted custom AI system architecture and integrations.
- **Engineering & Automation**: Custom CRM database integrations, notification triggers, and custom developer frameworks.
- **AI Visibility**: Optimization of website structure and indexes to maximize visibility on AI Search Engines (AEO, GEO, and SEO).
- **AI Commerce**: Transactional qualifications and qualification logic for premium e-commerce services.

## Directory / Main Pages
- [Homepage](https://orangelabz.com/) - Overview of services, live tracker dashboard, and interactive ROI calculator.
- [AI Agents](https://orangelabz.com/ai-agents) - Details about our inbound-first voice and message qualifications agents.
- [AI Implementation](https://orangelabz.com/ai-implementation) - Our custom model engineering services.
- [Engineering](https://orangelabz.com/engineering) - Custom developer operations and database pipelines.
- [AI Visibility](https://orangelabz.com/ai-visibility) - Optimization for modern LLM searches and GEO.
- [AI Commerce](https://orangelabz.com/ai-commerce) - Transactional qualification.
- [Pricing](https://orangelabz.com/pricing) - Our productized pilots and custom enterprise solutions.
- [Jugaad AI](https://orangelabz.com/jugaad-ai) - SMB productized package overview.
- [Solutions](https://orangelabz.com/solutions) - Case studies and verticals map.
- [About](https://orangelabz.com/about) - Agency background and core engineering values.
- [Contact](https://orangelabz.com/contact) - Contact form to request a free 45-minute AI Audit.
- [Blog](https://orangelabz.com/blog) - Technical articles on agent design patterns, DPDP act compliance, and local deployment options.
